messages.unsyncedModsMessage: You have unsynced mods that won't be applied in the game. Do you want to launch the game anyway?

gameLaunched.title: Game Launched
gameLaunched.description: Brown Dust II has been launched successfully.

gameLaunchError.title: Failed to Launch Game
gameLaunchError.description: An error occurred while trying to launch Brown Dust II

visibleColumns.label: Visible Columns
visibleColumns.description: Choose which columns appear in the mod list.

modName.label: Display
modName.description: Show the short mod name or the full mod name.

hideConflicts.label: Hide Conflict Indicator
hideConflicts.description: Suppress the conflict badge on mods that share files with others.

character.description: Show the character icon, name, or both.

modType.label: Display
modType.description: Show the mod type icon, label, or both.

enableColors.label: Enable Colors for Mod Types
enableColors.description: Apply a color per mod type (standing, cutscene, dating, etc.).

enableModTypeIcon.label: Show Mod Type Icons
enableModTypeIcon.description: Display a small icon representing the mod type.

enableCharacterAvatars.label: Show Character Avatars
enableCharacterAvatars.description: Display character portraits next to each mod.

syncMethod.label: Sync Method
syncMethod.description: How mods are installed into game folder.

autoSyncMods.label: Auto-sync mods on enable/disable
autoSyncMods.description: Automatically sync mods to game folder when enabling or disabling them

searchRecursively.label: Search Mods Recursively
searchRecursively.description: Enable this option to search for mods in subdirectories of the mods directory.

checkForAppUpdates.label: Automatically check for updates on startup
checkForAppUpdates.description: Enable this option to automatically check for new versions of BD2ModManager when the application startss.

autoUpdateModPreview.label: Automatically update mod preview on startup
autoUpdateModPreview.description: Enable this option to automatically check for updates for BD2ModPreview when the application starts and update it if a new version is available.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.warningMessage: These features are experimental and may not work as expected.

search.placeholder: Search mods by name, character, or author...

syncModsConfirmation.title: Sync Mods
syncModsConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to sync mods to the game directory? This will copy or link the enabled mods to the Brown Dust II installation folder.

unsyncModsConfirmation.title: Unsync Mods
unsyncModsConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to unsync mods from the game directory? This will remove the synced mods from the Brown Dust II installation folder.

syncModsWithConflicts.title: Sync Mods with Conflicts
syncModsWithConflicts.message: Some of the mods you are trying to sync have conflicts with other mods. Do you want to sync them anyway?

deleteMod.title: Delete Mod
deleteMod.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{modName}"? This action cannot be undone.

deleteSelectedMods.title: Delete Selected Mods
deleteSelectedMods.message: Are you sure you want to delete the {count} selected mods? This action cannot be undone.

messages.noMods: No mods found. Click the 'Add Mod' button to add your first mod.
messages.noResults: No mods match your search criteria.

syncSuccess.title: Mods Synced
syncSuccess.description: Mods synced successfully to the game directory.

unsyncSuccess.title: Mods Unsynced
unsyncSuccess.description: Mods unsynced successfully from the game directory.

syncFailed.title: Sync Failed
syncFailed.description: Failed to sync mods to the game directory.

unsyncFailed.title: Unsync Failed
unsyncFailed.description: Failed to unsync mods from the game directory.

previewUnavailable.title: Preview Unavailable
previewUnavailable.description: Mod preview is unavailable for this mod because it contains errors.

messages.selectProfile: Select a profile to view details

deleteConfirmation.title: Delete Profile
deleteConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

createProfile.title: Create New Profile
createProfile.description: Enter a name and an optional description for the new profile.

placeholders.templateProfile: Select a profile to copy from (optional)

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.description: Edit the name and description of the profile.

descriptions.bepinex: BepInEx is a modding framework. It is required for BrownDustX to work properly.
descriptions.browndustx: BrownDustX is a plugin for BepInEx that adds various quality of life improvements and allows you to use mods in Brown Dust II.
descriptions.configurationManager: Configuration Manager is a plugin for BepInEx that allows you to configure BrownDustX settings in-game.

messages.configurationManagerNotInstalled: Configuration Manager is not installed, you won't be able to configure BrownDustX settings in-game.
messages.dragDropInfo: Drag & Drop ZIP here to install BrownDustX or BepInEx
messages.noLogsYet: The logs will be shown here.
messages.bepinexNotRemoveable: BepInEx cannot be removed because it was not installed by BD2ModManager.
messages.bdxNotRemoveable: BrownDustX cannot be removed because it was not installed by BD2ModManager.
messages.bepinexMissing: BepInEx is missing. Please install BepInEx to use BrownDustX.
messages.bannerWarning: If you've already installed BepInEx or BrownDustX manually, the installer may not correctly update or remove existing files.
messages.bannerRisk: Use this feature at your own risk.
messages.bannerDiscord: If you installed BepInEx from Github and face issues, try the BepInEx version from the BrownDustX Discord before reporting any issues.

removeBepInEx.title: Remove BepInEx
removeBepInEx.message: Are you sure you want to remove BepInEx? This will also remove BrownDustX and all other plugins that depend on BepInEx.

removeBrownDustX.title: Remove BrownDustX
removeBrownDustX.message: Are you sure you want to remove BrownDustX? This will also remove all BrownDustX features and mods that depend on it.

removeConfigManager.title: Remove Configuration Manager
removeConfigManager.message: Are you sure you want to remove Configuration Manager? You will no longer be able to configure BrownDustX settings in-game.

steps.step1: Download the latest BepInEx release from the official Github repository.
steps.step2: Extract the contents of the downloaded ZIP file.
steps.step3: Copy the extracted BepInEx folder into your Brown Dust II game directory.
steps.step4: Download the latest BrownDustX release from the official Github repository.
steps.step5: Extract the contents of the downloaded ZIP file and copy the BrownDustX.dll file into the BepInEx/plugins folder.

messages.noModsFound: No mods installed for this character costume.
messages.noModsInfo: Visit the Mods page to install new mods.

changeModAuthor.title: Edit Author
changeModAuthor.description: Enter the new author name for this mod.

changeModName.title: Rename Mod
changeModName.description: Enter the new name for this mod.

welcome.title: Welcome to BD2ModManager!
welcome.subtitle: It looks like this is your first time launching the app. You can set up your game directory now or skip and do it later in the settings.

selectGameDirectory.title: Game Directory
selectGameDirectory.description: Please, select the the folder containing 'BrownDust II.exe'.

placeholders.gamePath: Path to Brown Dust II game directory

selectGameDirectory.invalidPath: Please select a valid game directory to proceed.

errors.invalidGameExecutable: The selected file is not the Brown Dust II executable.
errors.invalidDirectory: The selected directory does not contain a valid Brown Dust II installation.
errors.noGamePathSelected: No game path selected. Please select a valid game directory to proceed.

logs.title: Application Logs
logs.noLogs: No logs yet. The logs will be shown here.

errors.modAlreadyExists: A mod with the same name already exists.
errors.multipleModsFound: Multiple mods found. Please ensure only one mod is present.
errors.modPreviewContainsErrors: This mod contains errors and cannot be previewed.
errors.gameDirectoryNotSet: Game directory is not set. Please set it in the settings.
errors.stagingDirectoryNotSet: Staging mods directory is not set. Please set it in the settings.
errors.symlinkAdminRequired: Administrator privileges are required to create symbolic links.
errors.removalFailed: Failed to remove file or directory: {error}

modErrors.missingTextures: You need to create a folder inside the mod folder named 'textures'.
modErrors.missingModfile: You need to create a .modfile inside this mod folder.
modErrors.archiveNotExtracted: This mod is a compressed file that has not been extracted yet. Please extract it before trying to enable it.
modErrors.shouldBeInFolder: This mod should be inside a folder. Please create a folder with the same name as the mod and move the mod file inside it.
modErrors.missingAtlasFile: This mod is missing the atlas file.

app.exitConfirmationMessage: You have unsynced changes. Are you sure you want to exit without syncing?
